creator: mvalleton@noparking.net
text:
Well... I might have been misled by the Mastodon issue, since it's supposed to work fine from Mastodon >= 4.2, and it does, my issue was a problem on my side (not enough resources during setup) that produces an oddly similar error to what used to happen with node18 and Mastodon < 4.2.

Sorry for the noise.
